name: repost-with-agent
description: Skill-only agent/OpenClaw-compatible plugin for agent-driven, browser-based reposting across websites the current harness can safely operate through a logged-in browser. Ships documented examples for LinkedIn, X, Bluesky, Threads, and Facebook, plus a source-item fanout contract so scheduled backfill slots handle one source item across all enabled destinations. No CLI, no MCP server, no Playwright, no platform SDKs — just skills + commands + JSON state, custom rules, dedupe, fanout manifests, and aggregate source-item confirmations.
